name: NA-MPNN
description: Unified representation for proteins, DNA, and RNA. Design RNA sequences given a structure. Predict the specificity of a protein-DNA complex.
capabilities: Unified representation for proteins, DNA, and RNA
Design RNA sequences given a structure
Predict the specificity of a protein-DNA complex

pdbFile.description: Input structure in PDB format containing protein and/or nucleic acid

designedChains.description: Chain IDs of nucleic acid chains to design sequences for
